name: Rakha Ramiro - Electronics Engineer
description: Electronics Engineering student with a strong foundation in analog and digital electronics, embedded systems, and Internet of Things (IoT). Proficient in designing electronic circuits, programming microcontrollers (ESP32, STM32, and Arduino), developing embedded applications, and integrating sensors and communication protocols. Experienced in hardware prototyping, PCB design, troubleshooting, and system integration. Passionate about innovation, automation, and intelligent electronic systems, with excellent analytical, teamwork, and problem-solving skills. Seeking opportunities to apply technical expertise and continue growing as an electronics engineer.
